noveltyJustification: 5 of 6 findings directly revalidated current templates/rules/constitutional files; T1 deferral was partially known but confirmed against current validation surfaces.
findings: T3 remains unimplemented in current manifest templates and should use HTML-comment guidance, not tracked headings.
T4 remains planned; current PHASE_PARENT_CONTENT is warning-only and phase-parent-only, so implementation must reconcile INFO/warn wording.
T2 remains unimplemented; constitutional files have importanceTier frontmatter but no last_confirmed metadata.
T1 should remain deferred because current validation/checklist structures do not provide per-criterion coverage gating.
